KeysToEntries.Ammo_M80_762x51_Description: The 7.62x51mm NATO M80 cartridge is widely used for military and civilian applications due to its reliability and solid performance.
KeysToEntries.Ammo_M80A1_762x51_Description: The 7.62x51mm M80A1 consistently delivers excellent fragmentation, effective armor penetration, and barrier-blind characteristics.
KeysToEntries.Ammo_M61_762x51_Description: The 7.62x51mm (M61) armor-piercing cartridge is specifically designed to penetrate armor due to its pointed steel core. It is commonly used in military applications because of its enhanced penetration capability, which makes it effective against armored targets.
KeysToEntries.Ammo_M62_762x51_Description: This tracer cartridge conforms to NATO standards and is comparable to the M62. It features a luminous trace that extends up to 775 meters from the muzzle, visible during both day and night, making it suitable for all 7.62x51mm firearms.
KeysToEntries.Ammo_Hpbt_762x51_Description: The .308 Winchester (308 WIN.) ammunition with Hollow Point Boat Tail (HPBT) combines precision and terminal performance. The HPBT bullet is designed for accuracy and enhances stability in flight, making it a favored choice for precision shooting and hunting applications.
